compiled_state.title: [completion-verifier]: epic SC requiring end-to-end installer run accepted without actually running the installer -> epic baff-7163 closed while installer returned 404 on first real user
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview

Epic baff-7163 SC1 required 'the installer completes all steps and opens Claude Code within 10 minutes measured from the curl command'. SC3 required 'invoking /dso:roadmap in the first Claude Code session produces a roadmap prompt without emitting any gate-blocked error'. Both are only verifiable by running scripts/create-dso-app.sh end-to-end. Neither was actually executed during epic closure — or if they were executed, they were executed against a mock that bypassed the real git clone. The epic was nonetheless marked closed.

## Reproduction

1. ticket show baff-7163 — status: closed
2. git log -- scripts/create-dso-app.sh — shows closing commits; no CI or validation run captures an end-to-end installer execution
3. Actually running the installer today: bash <(curl -fsSL .../create-dso-app.sh) demo-proto — fails with 'fatal: repository not found'

## Impact

The completion-verifier either did not run at epic closure, or it accepted narrative/log-based evidence for an SC that requires observable external behavior. The verification bias of 'documentation proves behavior' was not caught.

## Root Cause Hypothesis

dso:completion-verifier (sprint Phase 7 Step 0.75) has no requirement distinguishing observable-behavior SCs (must execute and observe) from documented-behavior SCs (can accept written evidence). When an SC requires invoking external resources (GitHub clone, curl download, network-dependent command), the verifier must reject narrative evidence and demand a real execution trace.

## Scope

Surface: dso:completion-verifier agent, sprint Phase 7 Step 0.75, sprint Step 10a story-closure verification.

## References

- Epic baff-7163 (closed with unverified observable SCs)
- Related bug: 0f2a-95c9 (TDD exemption gap — companion failure)
- Related open epic: 6068-cb2d (Completion verifier: goal-backward verification with must_haves separation)

comments.body: Triaged (debug-everything Bug-Fix Mode): bug targets an LLM-behavioral skill/agent/prompt file. Per CLAUDE.md rule 22 and behavioral-testing-standard Rule 5, any modification requires dedicated bot-psychologist investigation and explicit user approval. DEFERRED: batch-escalating to end-of-session user review; no code change applied this session.
comments.author: Test
